subtasks.description: Query budget allocation data by product category with cost trends (current and historical periods). Return total allocated, spent, variance, and trend metrics (YoY/QoQ growth rates) for each category.

Analyze budget allocation results to identify underutilized and overallocated categories. Apply cost-efficiency metrics and trend analysis to recommend reallocation strategy, including priority ranking, move magnitude, and risk assessment for each recommended shift.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks minimum: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) for the budget query because it requires multi-table joins across budget allocations and historical spend data with trend calculations (YoY/QoQ), warranting mid-complexity SQL; (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to synthesize allocation metrics with trend analysis and generate classification of categories plus reallocation recommendations. The cross_recon task includes recommendation generation as part of its reconciliation scope, so no separate policy_action is needed. Using mid-tier for both because the budget analysis involves multiple dimensions and the reallocation strategy requires reasoned trade-off analysis, but neither rises to frontier complexity without multi-signal reconciliation across completely disparate systems.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_spent, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS prior_year_spent, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS yoy_variance, ROUND(((SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) AS yoy_growth_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_current_spent, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_prior_spent, ROUND(((SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2023-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) AS qoq_growth_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.amount_usd > 0 GROUP BY cf.product ORDER BY current_year_spent DESC

reconciled.sql_value: current_year_spent, prior_year_spent, yoy_variance, yoy_growth_pct, q4_current_spent, q4_prior_spent, qoq_growth_pct
